LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ANDREW CRAMER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIES PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. FURTHER, COURT VACATES THE AWARD. COURT BELIEVES THERE SHOULD BE A NEW ARBITRATOR. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ANDREW CRAMER'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
APPEARANCES: Mark A. Senick, Esq. 252-9800 for petitioner & moving party; Loretta H. Hellen, Esq. 916/806-3101 respondent; John J. Cullen, Esq. Law Offices of Cullen & Wood 284-9271 for Rita Robinson.
RULING: Argued and the Court denies petition to confirm arbitration award. Further, Court vacates award. Court believes there should be a new arbitrator. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Application For Order To File Comnplaint In Intervention
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Rita Robinson's Application For Leave To Intervene.
APPEARANCES: Mark A. Senick, Esq. 252-9800 for petitioner; Loretta H. Hellen, Esq. 916/806-3101 respondent; John J. Cullen, Esq. Law Offices of Cullen & Wood 284-9271 for moving party Rita Robinson.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY HAS AN INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THIS LITIGATION. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
